A Noble is a person in a state of [[nobility]]. Generally the term refers to someone who is at a high level in the [[Lambda covenant]] or in the [[Alpha covenant]].

It is derived from the [[buddhist]] phrase [[Arhat]], but it is different in application

If one has completed [[Commandment Alpha Omega]] then one will be in touch with one's lineage in a way which gives a more European reading of the term.
[[Category:Lambda Covenant]]
[[sn:Nobles]][[Category:Lambda Covenant]]
[[sn:Nobles]][[Category:Lambda]]
[[Category:Ascension]]
[[sn:Nobles]][[Category:Nobility]]
[[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Nobles]][[Category:Nobles]]
[[Category:Pages]]
